mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_OUT') THEN p.payment_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_REVENUE, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_OUT') THEN 1 END) AS TOTAL_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.reservation_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS CANCEL_COUNT FROM PAYMENT p JOIN RESERVATION r ON p.payment_id = r.payment_id WHERE TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month}

SELECT TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'DD') AS PAID_DAY, SUM(p.payment_amount) AS DAILY_REVENUE FROM PAYMENT p JOIN RESERVATION r ON p.payment_id = r.payment_id WHERE TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_OUT') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'DD') ORDER BY PAID_DAY

SELECT TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS PAID_AT, p.payment_id AS PAYMENT_ID, m.name AS MEMBER_NAME, p.payment_amount AS PAYMENT_AMOUNT, r.reservation_status AS PAYMENT_STATUS FROM PAYMENT p JOIN RESERVATION r ON p.payment_id = r.payment_id JOIN tbl_member_security m ON p.member_no = m.member_no WHERE TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} ORDER BY p.paid_at DESC

SELECT rt.room_name AS ROOM_TYPE, SUM(p.payment_amount) AS TYPE_REVENUE FROM PAYMENT p JOIN RESERVATION r ON p.payment_id = r.payment_id JOIN ROOM_TYPE rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND r.reservation_status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CHECKED_OUT') GROUP BY rt.room_name
